title: Importing date/time into Monday Board
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am trying to import some data from a spreadsheet into a column (through Pipedream) and I am having trouble importing the date/time section. What format does this field has to be in, in order to be able to impor…

posts.author: LeviSzasz (Levi Szasz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am trying to import some data from a spreadsheet into a column (through Pipedream) and I am having trouble importing the date/time section. What format does this field has to be in, in order to be able to import in into the date column in Monday?

Thank you

posts.author: DanielSmith-IOI (Daniel Smith (IOI / BPX))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Levi,

Importing dates seems to be quite flexible - I’ve tried importing the following formats and all seem to be recognised correctly within a Monday.com date column:
DD/MM/YYYY
YYYY/MM/DD
MMM DD YYYY (e.g. Mar 11 2023)
DD-MMM-YY (e.g. 01-Feb-22)

This format did not come through correctly:
MM/DD/YYYY

Hope that helps, but do reach out if there’s anything else we at IOI/BPX can help with!

All the best,
Daniel
